name: DHL Mortgage
description_short: DHL Mortgage, powered by Premier Mortgage Resources LLC, is a Charlotte-based mortgage lender offering home purchase, refinance, and specialized loan programs across five states.
description_long:
DHL Mortgage is a residential mortgage lender based in Charlotte, North Carolina, operating under Premier Mortgage Resources, LLC. The company emphasizes local lending expertise and customer service as core values, positioning itself as a partner in clients' financial success rather than a transactional lender.

The company offers a comprehensive range of mortgage products including conventional home purchase mortgages, refinancing options, and specialized loan programs. Their specialized offerings include construction loans, investment property loans, DSCR (Debt Service Coverage Ratio) loans, bank statement loans, renovation loans, and niche programs for medical professionals (doctor/nurse loans). They operate as licensed lenders in North Carolina, South Carolina, Georgia, Virginia, and Florida, with their primary office located at 529 West Summit Ave in Charlotte.

DHL Mortgage distinguishes itself through personalized customer relationships and local team-based service. Their website features testimonials highlighting the work of specific loan officers (Dejana and John Basso) who reportedly provide hands-on guidance through the mortgage process, from initial consultation through closing. The company provides free online tools including an amortization calculator, quick quote functionality, and educational content about the mortgage process and common scams.

As a regional mortgage broker powered by a larger entity, DHL Mortgage serves borrowers seeking non-traditional loan products and personalized service in the Southeast. However, prospective borrowers should note that specific rates, terms, loan limits, and approval criteria are not disclosed on the public website, requiring direct contact for quotes.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Licensed in five states (NC, SC, GA, VA, FL) providing multi-state availability
Offers specialized loan programs not available at traditional banks (DSCR loans, bank statement loans, doctor/nurse loans)
Named loan officers available for ongoing client relationships rather than call center routing
Free online mortgage calculators and educational blog content on home buying and refinancing
Positive customer testimonials citing responsive communication via phone, email, and text
Construction loans and renovation financing available, appealing to real estate investors
Quick quote and online application functionality for initial borrower screening
cons: No specific interest rates, APR ranges, or loan terms published on website—requires direct contact
No clear disclosure of minimum credit score, down payment requirements, or debt-to-income limits
Limited information about processing timelines, appraisal costs, or closing fee structures
No third-party review aggregation (Google, Zillow, Trustpilot ratings) visible on website
Testimonials provided are unverified and appear to represent only positive experiences
best_for: Self-employed borrowers and real estate investors using DSCR or bank statement loans
Medical professionals (doctors, nurses) seeking specialized lending programs
Borrowers in the Southeast seeking local relationship-based mortgage service
Real estate investors requiring construction, investment property, or renovation financing
diagnosis: DHL Mortgage is best suited for borrowers seeking specialized loan products (DSCR, bank statement, construction) or personalized service in the Southeast, particularly self-employed professionals, real estate investors, and medical professionals. Primary caveat: transparent pricing and underwriting criteria are absent from their website, requiring direct contact to compare rates and terms against other lenders.
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
